query: Calculate the minimum required wall thickness for a cylindrical shell with inside diameter 1800 mm, design pressure 1.5 MPa, design temperature 350°C, material SM-516 Gr 70, Type 1 joint with full radiography, corrosion allowance 3.0 mm.

calculation_steps.description: Look up maximum allowable stress S from Table M-1.
Look up joint efficiency E from Table B-12 for Type 1, Full RT.
Check applicability of the simple thickness formula.

citation.quoted_text: (a) The minimum required thickness of shells subjected to internal pressure shall not be less than that computed by the following formulas, per A-27(c) and A-27(d)

calculation_steps.description: Compute minimum required thickness per A-27(c)(1).

citation.quoted_text: (a) The minimum required thickness of shells subjected to internal pressure shall not be less than that computed by the following formulas, per A-27(c) and A-27(d)

calculation_steps.description: Add corrosion allowance per A-25.

citation.quoted_text: (a) A corrosion allowance (CA) shall be added to the minimum required thickness calculated by A-27 or A-32

calculation_steps.description: Select next standard plate thickness.

citation.quoted_text: (a) The minimum required thickness of shells subjected to internal pressure shall not be less than that computed by the following formulas, per A-27(c) and A-27(d)

calculation_steps.description: Back-calculate MAWP using corroded thickness.

final_response.query: Calculate the minimum required wall thickness for a cylindrical shell with inside diameter 1800 mm, design pressure 1.5 MPa, design temperature 350°C, material SM-516 Gr 70, Type 1 joint with full radiography, corrosion allowance 3.0 mm.
final_response.answer: Minimum required thickness t_min = 11.94 mm; design thickness with corrosion allowance = 14.94 mm; selected nominal plate = 16 mm; MAWP back-calculated from the selected plate = 1.633 MPa.
